name: PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk
summary: PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk primarily engages in consumer financing activities in Indonesia. The company provides financing services for new and second-hand motor vehicles. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 41 branch offices located in Jakarta, Bogor, Depok, Tangerang and Bekasi, West Java, Central Java, East Java, North Sumatera, Riau, and South Sumatera. The company was formerly known as PT HD Finance Tbk and changed its name to PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk in June 2014. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. As of November 25, 2019, PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk operates as a prior subsidiary of PT Tiara Marga Trakindo.
